chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1681 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case. 27-03-2025 None present. This petition is pending since 2024 without any progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
